reviews.review_text: Seller was generally responsive and the car's major components checked out well, but minor interior wear was not disclosed upfront.
revealed_facts: Driver seat bolster has minor wear and slight fabric pilling from entry/exit

reviews.review_text: Seller did not disclose a minor interior defect upfront, but was willing to negotiate on price once it was discovered.
revealed_facts: Small cigarette burn on rear passenger seat fabric, approximately 1cm diameter, partially hidden by seat crease
